variant_name: 高父 — 误以为女儿婚姻转暖的居家父亲
trigger: 高令宁回娘家养胎期间，沈词日日来探，高父误以为夫妻关系渐好，因此在家中呈现出较放松、略带宽慰的状态。

appearance_delta.face: 愁容比主设定略淡，神情更柔和，像是短暂放下心事
appearance_delta.body: 姿态更居家化，少了正式待客时的挺拔威压
appearance_delta.hair: 仍束冠整齐，但比正式场合稍显日常
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 眼神里出现久违的安心与撮合之意，体现他一度仍希望女儿婚姻可继续维系

costume_override.outfit: 素色长衫，偏家居文士装束，简洁而不失士大夫身份

visual_reference: Ancient Chinese middle-aged scholar father at home, slim and slightly frail from years of desk work, kind face with visible fine wrinkles, black-and-gray hair neatly bound, wearing a plain muted long robe in blue-gray and brown tones, standing under a traditional corridor in a refined courtyard, expression softened with cautious relief, gentle but thoughtful fatherly presence, realistic historical Chinese domestic setting
visual_prompt_negative: official court armor, bright red ceremonial clothing, long exaggerated beard, modern furniture, muscular physique, glasses, vivid fantasy colors
emotional_tone: 短暂宽慰、温和、带着误判后的希望
